description.ko: 유리를 통해 굴절되는 빛의 미학을 시각적으로 탐구하는 PRISM-2는 백색광이 생생한 스펙트럼으로 변하는 정교한 순간을 포착하여 광학 물리학의 기하학적 아름다움을 강조합니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of light bending through glass, PRISM-2 captures the precise moment when white light transforms into a vivid spectrum, highlighting the geometric beauty of optical physics.

prompt: A cinematic, high-detail macro shot of a PRISM-2 glass polyhedron refracting a single beam of intense white light. The light splits into a sharp, vibrant spectrum of rainbow colors across a dark, matte surface. Visible caustic light patterns, sharp chromatic aberration, crystalline transparency, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, ray-tracing aesthetics, minimalist composition.
